name: american-savage-insights-slights-and-fights-on-faith-sex-love-and-politics
description: Dan Savage's provocative collection of essays on sex, relationships, gay rights, parenting, and the culture wars — from the creator of the It Gets Better Project.
useCase: Understand Dan Savage's perspectives on sex ethics, LGBTQ rights, parenting, and political activism with humor and compassion.
knownRisks: Contains explicit sexual content and strong opinions
Some may find Savage's views on monogamy controversial
Essay collection — not a systematic guide
